title: Querying number of widget instances across an account

posts.author: aleksandar (Aleksandar Petrov)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’m currently developing a dashboard widget app and need a way to query the total number of instances of the same dashboard widget being used across an account—not just on a specific board or dashboard.
Does anyone have a solution to this? It’s quite urgent, and any help or guidance would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you in advance!
Aleksandar
